gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor stands confidently with arms open wide, smiling while announcing the topic of adding five plus five
a person raises both hands and proudly shows five fingers on each hand, encouraging the class to participate
a tutor steps forward slightly, holding up one hand with five fingers while emphasizing the number five
a person gestures smoothly with both hands as if adding, bringing them together to symbolize adding another five
a tutor leans in slightly, tilting their head with curiosity while asking the class about the total when adding
a person moves toward a table, bending forward with enthusiasm as they prepare to use blocks for addition
a tutor counts along while bending down to pick up blocks, raising each block to show five and then five more
a person stands tall with arms raised in excitement, inviting the learners to share how many blocks they have
a tutor jumps slightly with joy, giving a thumbs up while celebrating the total of five plus five equals ten
a person sweeps both arms outward with a big grin, expressing that adding numbers can be fun and exciting
